title: Wellness Programs * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Wellness Programs * Native American Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Older Adults Native American Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER HEALTH EQUITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps connect the community to resources that address social factors affecting health and provide culturally relevant health education and health policy advocacy. Services include information and referral, mental health groups, talking circles, and traditional and family wellness opportunities. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Individuals who self-identified as Native Americans Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 288-8177 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER HEALTH EQUITY
